notes: Automated approval gates are the Node Frontend Checks, PHP Compatibility and WordPress Smoke Tests GitHub Actions workflows.
The installed tree reports peer warnings for react-autosize-textarea@7.1.0 against React 18.3.1 via @wordpress/edit-post and @wordpress/editor.
toolingCaveats: Local Composer/PHP validation is available in this shell environment (Composer version 2.9.5 2026-01-29 11:40:53; PHP 8.5.4 (cli) (built: Mar 10 2026 23:15:23) (NTS)).
The npm and Packagist lookups require network access when the report is regenerated.

batches.title: Baseline and tracking scaffolding
batches.scope: Report generator, dependency reports and phased smoke-test guidance.
approvalNotes: No dependency versions change in this phase.

batches.title: Frontend gates for approval
batches.scope: Create the Node workflow and treat PHP compatibility plus WordPress smoke checks as mandatory future gates.
automatedChecks: GitHub Actions WordPress Smoke Tests workflow
approvalNotes: No dependency versions or lockfiles change in this phase.
manualReviewItems: Confirm the Node frontend, PHP Compatibility and WordPress Smoke Tests workflows trigger on push and pull_request events.

batches.title: Build tooling major
batches.scope: Upgrade the WordPress build toolchain major and keep the custom webpack config working.
automatedChecks: GitHub Actions WordPress Smoke Tests workflow
manualReviewItems: No dedicated manual review unless asset or wp-admin regressions become visible.

batches.title: Minimum JS test layer
batches.scope: Add unit tests for the contracts that protect the remaining majors.

batches.title: Date picker major
batches.scope: Upgrade the date picker used in related-post filters.
automatedChecks: GitHub Actions WordPress Smoke Tests workflow
manualReviewItems: Select start and end dates in the related-posts sidebar.
Save the post, reload the editor and verify persisted values.
Clear dates and confirm empty values stay cleared after saving.

batches.title: Template runtime major
batches.scope: Upgrade Eta without changing the popup template contract.
automatedChecks: GitHub Actions WordPress Smoke Tests workflow
manualReviewItems: Open a map popup and verify the title, date and featured image rendering.
Open the map Info panel and verify template-driven content still renders.
Verify any locally customized popup template still compiles.

batches.title: Leaflet sidebar major
batches.scope: Upgrade the post geocoding sidebar map and keep editing interactions intact.
automatedChecks: GitHub Actions WordPress Smoke Tests workflow
manualReviewItems: Add a point and confirm it appears in the Leaflet map.
Edit an existing point and confirm map focus plus field values update.
Drag a marker, toggle magnetic markers, cancel, save and reopen the editor.

batches.title: CKEditor React major evaluation
batches.scope: Evaluate the React wrapper major only if it remains compatible with the installed CKEditor core line.
automatedChecks: GitHub Actions WordPress Smoke Tests workflow
manualReviewItems: Load the storymap editor and confirm the toolbar initializes.
Verify text selection formatting still applies and the selection is retained.
Upload an image, save the storymap and reopen it.

batches.title: PHPCS major evaluation
batches.scope: Evaluate PHPCS 4 only if WPCS 3.3.0 and the local Composer/PHP toolchain support it.

batches.title: Replacement dependencies outside the current semver-major scope
batches.scope: Track deprecated packages that require replacement work instead of an in-place semver major upgrade.

executionLog.summary: Added phase planning, package-level execution tracking and the phased approval checklist without changing dependency versions.

automatedChecks.name: npm run deps:report
automatedChecks.details: Regenerated the JSON and Markdown reports against current npm and Packagist metadata.

executionLog.summary: Added a Node frontend GitHub Actions workflow and promoted the PHP compatibility plus WordPress smoke workflows to the mandatory gate set for future dependency phases.

automatedChecks.name: npm ci
automatedChecks.details: Installed the existing lockfile successfully. The run repeated the already tracked react-autosize-textarea peer warnings and the known deprecation notices for react-beautiful-dnd and react-jsonschema-form.

automatedChecks.name: npm run build
automatedChecks.details: wp-scripts build completed successfully with the existing bundle-size warnings only.

manualReviewItems: Confirm the Node frontend, PHP Compatibility and WordPress Smoke Tests workflows trigger on push and pull_request events.

smokeTests.title: Build plugin assets
smokeTests.expected: npm run build completes without new warnings or bundle errors.

smokeTests.title: Create and edit a map
smokeTests.expected: The Maps editor loads, map settings persist, and the preview updates without console errors.

smokeTests.title: Edit a storymap with CKEditor
smokeTests.expected: The storymap editor loads, inline rich text editing works, and image upload still attaches media.

smokeTests.title: Reorder layers and storymap slides
smokeTests.expected: Drag-and-drop or movable ordering works in all UIs that currently rely on reordering.

smokeTests.title: Edit layer and legend forms
smokeTests.expected: Schema-driven forms, legend settings and interaction settings still render and save.

smokeTests.title: Filter stories by date in Discovery
smokeTests.expected: The date range picker applies and clears filters correctly.

smokeTests.title: Use geocoding autosuggest
smokeTests.expected: Address suggestions load, selection writes values back, and no stale request errors appear.

smokeTests.title: Render maps in both Mapbox and MapLibre modes
smokeTests.expected: Frontend and editor previews render with both runtimes, including layers, legends and interactions.
